Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Interface MergeContract

All Superinterfaces:
SpecificationElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
PredicateAbstractionMergeContract, UnparameterizedMergeContract
public interface MergeContract extends SpecificationElement
Specification of a MergePointStatement.

      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
